parameters.name: alpine_weather
parameters.description: Alpine weather with snow depth, freezing level, and 7-day forecast. Parameter: location (place name, e.g. 'Zugspitze', 'Garmisch-Partenkirchen', 'Mittenwald')

schema.description: Location name for alpine weather query (e.g. Zugspitze, Garmisch-Partenkirchen)
